description: Optional workspace conventions for coordinating multiple Claude Code / Codex sessions inside Herdr (https://github.com/ogulcancelik/herdr, https://herdr.dev), a free local terminal multiplexer. Selecting this profile is a per-project opt-in and has no effect on any project or profile that does not select it.
notes: skills selects herdr-workspace (skills/herdr-workspace/SKILL.md) directly so scripts/sync.mjs exports it; capabilities is intentionally empty because Herdr is never catalogued or vendored as a reusable capability record, only referenced as an externally installed local binary the user installs themselves. Full pane-topology, the HERDR_ENV=1 ownership-signal gate, Claude Code/Codex usage, Windows/WSL2 guidance, and the AGPL boundary are documented in integrations/herdr/README.md, skills/herdr-workspace/SKILL.md, and notices/herdr.md — this profile only selects; it does not restate them.
